title: Elixir Ash Framework - Basics
summary: A gentle, high-level tour of Elixir's Ash Framework — model your domain, derive the rest. Resources, actions, domains, code interfaces, relationships, data layers, policies, and the extension ecosystem, grounded in the official Ash v3.29 docs. The user's four seed requests (make the high-level concepts very clear, add illustrations, and the what-is-ash / llms.txt source links) were interpreted as the book's brief and folded into these eight concept pages plus illustration slots.

images.prompt: A refined flat-vector book-cover illustration for a technical book on the Elixir Ash Framework. Centerpiece: a single glowing violet architectural blueprint or triangular 'Ash' mark, with faint elegant lines radiating outward to suggest generated APIs, a database, and an admin panel — the idea of 'model your domain, derive the rest'. Warm off-white drafting-paper background with a very faint blueprint grid, deep violet and magenta accents, generous whitespace, calm and premium. No baked-in text. Target size ~1280x1600px, 4:5 portrait; keep the subject centred with safe margins.
images.alt: The Ash Framework — model your domain, derive the rest
images.caption: Cover art for the Ash Framework field guide.

images.prompt: A clean, modern editorial illustration in flat vector style: a single glowing violet architectural blueprint at the center, with elegant arrows radiating outward to four small labeled icons — a GraphQL/REST API endpoint, a database cylinder, a shield (authorization), and an admin dashboard. Conveys 'one source of truth generates everything.' Warm off-white paper background, violet and magenta accents, generous whitespace, no baked-in text. Target size ~1280x720px, 16:9 landscape; keep the subject centred with safe margins.
images.alt: A single blueprint at the center radiating into a GraphQL API, a REST API, a database, and an admin panel
images.caption: One declared domain; everything else is derived from it.

images.prompt: A clean flat-vector editorial illustration: a single tidy house (representing the domain / resource) resting on top of three interchangeable foundation blocks shown side by side and clearly swappable — one labeled with a lightning/memory chip icon (ETS), one with an elephant/database-cylinder icon (Postgres), one with a network-of-nodes icon (Mnesia). A hand or arrow suggests sliding one block out and another in, while the house stays perfectly still. Warm off-white background, violet and teal accents, generous whitespace, no baked-in text labels. Target size ~1280x720px, 16:9 landscape; keep the subject centred with safe margins.
images.alt: A stable house resting on interchangeable foundation blocks labeled ETS, Postgres, and Mnesia
images.caption: The domain stays put; the foundation underneath it is swappable.

images.prompt: A clean flat-vector editorial illustration of a solar-system / constellation: a single glowing violet core labeled conceptually as the resource at the center, with six small satellite planets orbiting it on thin elegant orbit rings, each satellite carrying a distinct simple icon — a GraphQL hexagon, a REST/JSON braces symbol, a key (authentication), a dashboard/admin gauge, a clock (background jobs), and a small spark/AI node. Warm off-white background, violet and magenta accents with soft glows, generous whitespace, no baked-in text labels. Target size ~1280x720px, 16:9 landscape; keep the core centred with safe margins.
images.alt: A central resource core with extension satellites orbiting it: GraphQL, JSON:API, Auth, Admin, Oban, AI
images.caption: One resource core; each extension is a capability orbiting it.
